label: Gloamreach System
description: The Gloamreach System is a rift-shadowed stellar demesne within Imperium Nihilus, its primary star veiled behind persistent empyrean glare that stains the void with bruise-colored aurorae. Translation margins remain unstable, and plotted warp approaches collapse into narrow, hazardous corridors monitored by intermittent beacon-signals and silence-tainted auspex returns. The system’s inner orbits carry the debris of void-war and neglected infrastructure, forming wide belts of wreckage, frozen fuel, and derelict stations. Long-range vox and astropathic traffic fracture into delayed, corrupted fragments, enforcing isolation as a defining condition of interplanetary transit.
